dissection.title: Case Study: How Do Residents Transition Between Their Care Home and The Emergency Department?

design.evidence: A single embedded case study design

sample.text: care home and emergency department staff, residents and relatives
sample.evidence: interviews with care home and emergency department staff, residents and relatives

measures.evidence: interviews with care home and emergency department staff, residents and relatives

analysis.evidence: allowing for the exploration of the topic at hand through multiple lenses

findings.evidence: Two sets of themes were identified

contributions.evidence: This study extends existing research by offering a theoretically informed account

future.text: guidance for digital and AI-enabled systems
future.evidence: including guidance for digital and AI-enabled systems

notes: study focused on transitions between care homes and emergency departments in England
